description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever an opponent misses you with a melee attack, you may move 5 feet as an immediate action so long as you remain within that opponentâs threatened area. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. If you take this step, you cannot take a 5-foot step during your next turn. If you take an action to move during your next turn, subtract 5 feet from your total movement.
